title: Wapol Appears at Sea
description: On pages 1–4, wapol appears at sea as the crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom.
scene: Wapol Appears at Sea. The crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Can a person stand on top of an ocean?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: The heck are you asking, Zoro?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Y-Yeah, for real. It's freezing today...
